---
title: 'Links to Praise and Music Research'
date: '2013-03-24T21:22:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Towdah: tō·dä'''
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3603733818337935156'
blogger_filename: '/2013/03/links-to-praise-and-music-research.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Towdah_ tō·dä_/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Misc Research'
---

<br />
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any" href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any">http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any" href="http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any">http://www.blueletterbible.org/search/lexiconc.cfm?ss=music&amp;searchtype=any</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
\</div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/praise" href="http://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/praise">http://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/praise</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Praise" href="http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Praise">http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Praise</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://dictionary.reference.com/browse/praise" href="http://dictionary.reference.com/browse/praise">http://dictionary.reference.com/browse/praise</a></div>
<div style="color: #333333; font-family: Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Bitstream Charter', Times, serif; font-size: 13px; line-height: 19px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.google.com/search?hl=en&amp;q=praise&amp;aq=f&amp;aqi=g10&amp;aql=&amp;oq=&amp;gs_rfai=" href="http://www.google.com/search?hl=en&amp;q=praise&amp;aq=f&amp;aqi=g10&amp;aql=&amp;oq=&amp;gs_rfai=">http://www.google.com/search?hl=en&amp;q=praise&amp;aq=f&amp;aqi=g10&amp;aql=&amp;oq=&amp;gs_rfai=</a></div>
